name: Orica Limited
analysis: ORI has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Trade setup: entry A$22.8176, stop A$21.8972, target A$23.6100. Risk/reward is 0.86:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
